title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team used Claude Code to achieve rapid scaling from $1 billion to $19 billion in 14 months. He identifies four strategies: automating existing workflows, enabling previously uneconomical work, building unique tools, and using AI as a thought partner, while highlighting a common ceiling where AI becomes busywork rather than leverage.
